title: Moving the cursor and single click
drDigitalIntro:
Let's practice two skills: moving the cursor and clicking.
• Slide one fingertip on the trackpad to move the cursor.
• Press down until you feel a soft click to select something.
• In the game, move to a falling shape and click it before it lands!

playgroundTask.instructions: Click each falling shape before it reaches the bottom. New ones keep dropping!

drDigitalSuccess: Fantastic clicking! You've got moving the cursor and single-clicking down.
drDigitalHint: Move your cursor right over a falling shape and click once. Don't worry if you miss one — more keep coming.
